raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX ) I needed to order XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, and XXXX search brought up XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX as official manufacturer website. 

XXXX ) I placed order, the order was delivered, BUT it was not shipped correctly. XXXX XXXX XXXX  product is temperature sensitive. 

XXXX ) When clicked on email link in confirmation order, I noticed that the store doesn't exist XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX ) I thought it was just a glitch, and searched for the store online again, and I found https : XXXX the real one! 

XXXX ) I emailed the real store, and they told me that " Unfortunately, there are copycat websites impersonating our brand by using our imagery and branding without permission. These sites are not affiliated with us and may be selling non-authentic products. We take this very seriouslyyour trust means everything to us, and were actively working to protect our customers and our brand from these bad actors. We take these matters very seriously to ensure our customers receive genuine products After our initial investigation, we've confirmed that your order was not purchased through our official site, XXXX. Your XXXX XXXX XXXX order was indeed been mishandled by these impersonators, as our standard shipment of XXXX XXXX XXXX products would contain ice packs and insulating materials XXXX ) So they confirmed that my order was NOT with them, even through first website looked exactly like them. 

XXXX ) I submitted dispute with the bank, and the bank did not investigate issue properly and resolved my dispute in favor of the scam website.
